info.title: Essenza Access Control API
info.description: API para gestión de control de acceso, permisos, roles, usuarios y navegación

tags.name: IUser Policy Assignment
tags.description: APIs for assigning policies to users

get.description: Returns a user by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing user by ID

put.description: Updates an existing role by ID

put.description: Updates an existing role-permission by composite key

delete.description: Deletes a role-permission relation by composite key

get.description: Returns a profile by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing profile by ID

get.description: Retrieve a specific policy by its ID
Returns a permission by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing permission by ID

get.description: Returns a module application by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing module application by ID

delete.description: Deletes a module application by ID

get.description: Returns a menu by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing menu by ID

put.description: Updates an existing menu-permission by composite key

delete.description: Deletes a menu-permission relation by composite key

get.description: Returns a company by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing company by ID

get.description: Returns a client by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing client by ID

put.description: Updates an existing application by ID

get.description: Returns all users. Optional filter by username

post.description: Assign a policy to a specific user

get.description: Returns all roles. Optional filter by name

Returns all profiles. Optional filter by userId
Retrieve all policies for a specific application
Returns all permissions. Supports optional filters: name, aplicationsId, moduleAplicationId
Returns all module applications with pagination. Supports optional filters: name, aplicationId
Returns all menus. Optional filters: name, parentId
Returns all menu-permission relations. Optional filters: menuId, permissionId
Returns all companies. Optional filters: name, nit
Returns all clients. Optional filter by cardId

Validate token and return user information for cross-project validation
Generate new access token from refresh token
Login with username and password to get JWT token
Authenticate employee user and get JWT tokens
Authenticate client user and get JWT tokens

get.description: Returns all applications

post.description: Validate user credentials without generating tokens
Internal login endpoint using LoginUseCase directly

get.description: Retrieve all active policies assigned to a user

get.summary: Get all descendants of a module
get.description: Returns all descendants (children, grandchildren, etc.) of a module
Returns direct children of a module
Returns root modules (no parent) for an application
Returns direct children of a menu
Returns all root menus (no parent)

Returns all menus accessible by a specific role
Check if employee authentication service is available
Check if client authentication service is available
Check if internal authentication service is available
